case_title: MENESES, VICTOR vs. INFANTE, LISSETTE BEATRICE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENESES, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INFANTE, LISSETTE BEATRICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3225 23RD STREET, #4, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522. -INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
